statement: In every magma, Equation 2698 (`x = ((y * x) * (x * x)) * z`) implies Equation 944 (`x = y * ((z * x) * (x * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0906
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y x) (op x x)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op z x) (op x y)))
